title: Hiring Software Engineer at 99acres Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Hiring Software Engineer at 99acres Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
99acres Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About 99acres Asia Pacific Associates:
99acres Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres Asia Pacific Associates!
